title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Registration Assistant Posts
description: Brihan Mumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Registration Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the BMC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are loo...
